identity.name: VMP CRM
identity.description: A streamlined CRM for managing doctor relationships and leads with precision and clarity.

typography.instructions: Import Manrope from Google Fonts. Use Manrope for all headings (h1-h3) and Inter for body text. Ensure high readability for data tables.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.header: bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground font-medium text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

universal_guidelines: Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, medical-tech feel.
Ensure all interactive elements have a hover state and active state.
Implement a responsive sidebar that collapses on mobile.
Use 'recharts' for any data visualization (e.g., leads by status).
All forms must use 'react-hook-form' and 'zod' for validation.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; stick to clean, solid colors or subtle patterns.
Ensure high contrast for text, especially in the data table.
Use 'data-testid' for all key interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install 'Manrope' font via Google Fonts in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js to include the new font family and custom colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create a reusable 'Layout' component that includes the Sidebar and Header.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the Dashboard page with the Bento Grid layout.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the Doctors List page using the Shadcn Table component with search and filter.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Create the Add/Edit Doctor form using Shadcn Form components.
